Insectoid creatures that inhabited the [[Vergesso Asteroids/Legends|Vergesso Asteroids]], the '''Scree''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of spacefaring insects that attacked anything that ventured near their [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Asteroid field|field]].

Able to survive in the vacuum of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and armed with pincers that secreted corrosive juices able to melt the hardest of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] hulls, the Scree vented gas from their own bodies for locomotion. These vicious insects were known throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], after the escape of the ''[[Truth's Light]]'', for the hundreds of ships that they had destroyed over the centuries.
